codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment und try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An fehler occurred while wird geladen this page

codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Anmelden again zu fortfahren.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mail is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid oder expired

privacy.title: Datenschutz
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences und session data are stored only on this device. Keinething is sent zu external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent zu configured services.

about.title: Über
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype für reference und training. Keinet für clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support und advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, oder determine Beatmungsgerät einstellungen.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against patient, your einrichtung workflow, und local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Erforderlich before continuing zu clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device und will be synchronisiert when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Prüfen safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data und uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible für patient care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in einrichtung context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active einrichtung und rolle shown by your session. Keep records within correct einrichtung workflow und follow local escalation, Prüfen, und approval procedures.

inputs.title: Eingeben:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use Aufnehmen zu eingeben: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Optional ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing optional data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a speichern blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations anzeigen advisory Beatmungsgerät setting references mit a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align mit your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only und verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Überwachung und alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a empfehlung, use Überwachung zu log vitals und labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds und should be assessed according zu local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Aufnehmen, advisory summaries, Überwachung) works offline. Data is saved locally. Optional AI features require connectivity. When Zurück online, fortfahren as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume und oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory zu expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, und pH, tied zu a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance und verification state für a reference range. Only active approved oder verified ranges are eligible für active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need Prüfen before dataset oder training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue für Prüfen decisions, corrections, exclusions, und audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, oder syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden von normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; eingeben: SpO₂ und andere vitals when available. für better matching, Hinzufügen PaO₂, PaCO₂, und pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Aufnehmen, advisory summaries, und Überwachung work offline. Data is stored locally. Optional AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not erforderlich für core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, ausstehend, retired, rejected, und unverified ranges are not eligible für active decision-support display. Prüfen source, version, scope, und verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness hilfe is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness und shadow-mode details are visible only zu approved governance roles. Keinermal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs Prüfen
needsReview.body: Use Prüfen queue zu check submitted data, request correction, genehmigen eligible records, oder Ausschließen records mit an audit grund.

guides.home: Prüfen einrichtung context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, und records needing Prüfen before opening a patient workflow.
guides.admit: Capture patient pathway und available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly und Prüfen backend-confirmed calculations after speichern.
guides.tracking: Use nachverfolgung zu scan recent ventilation status und Prüfen needs. Read trend flags mit source data und local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture für de-identified candidate records. Human Prüfen is erforderlich before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use Prüfen queue zu genehmigen, request correction, oder Ausschließen records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards für aggregate quality, Prüfen, reference, und governance status. Avoid patient identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use einstellungen für konto, einrichtung, accessibility, datenschutz, sync, und reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Prüfen FiO₂ und PEEP; consider recruitment; check für shunt oder V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Prüfen minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation und perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols und clinical judgment.

ai.label: KI-Entscheidungsunterstützung
ai.enableHint: Use online AI für complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture patient pathway, alter, body metrics, und grund für support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, und uncertain values. Beatmungsgerät einstellungen are suggested on weiter step von dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support patient is receiving when these values are measured.

saveReview.description: Prüfen und bearbeiten dataset-suggested Beatmungsgerät einstellungen, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override grund when needed, Prüfen status, und sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single name–value pair. Optional; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Name

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs oder andere metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used für trend analysis und Überwachung after you start session. Optional; you can Hinzufügen points later on Überwachung screen.
